Row 89053Tofu Egg Salad Recipes★★★★★
I was definitely impressed! I'm not allergic, nor am I a
vegan- but I want to try and eat healthier, so I decided to
try this recipe to incorporate more tofu into my diet. I
was shocked by how much it tastes like egg salad. I did
modify it, but nothing major. Left out the cayenne because
I don't...

Row 89060Tofu Egg Salad Recipes★★★★★
This tasted just great! Honestly it tasted just like an egg
salad. Even my tofu- phobe friends & boyfriend enjoyed this!

Row 89061Tofu Egg Salad Recipes★★★★★
I LOVED this recipe! SO easy to fix and the taste was
unbelievable for a tofu dish. I actually like this better
than real egg salad. I made this and let sit overnight to
meld. The spices and mustard really go wonderfully in this
recipe. I used spicy brown mustard, low fat tofu and fat
free mayo. Did...

Row 89067Tofu Egg Salad Recipes★★★★★
I was a little nervous about this recipe like some others,
but my partner and i both loved it. We have had it on
sandwiches, used it as a dip with chips and the other night
found ourselves craving it at 2 in the morning -- go figure.
I made an "egg salad" sandwich for a friend of mine who
hates to...

Row 89068Tofu Egg Salad Recipes★★★★★
I liked this recipe a lot. I made it with only 1 pound of
tofu as some of the reviewers suggested though, and I think
that made it a bit too overpoweringly mustardy. Next time
I'll cut the *whole* recipe in half, I think. But it was
quite delicious and I feel like I've made great strides in
becomin...

Row 89070Tofu Egg Salad Recipes★★★★★
My "loathes tofu" husband actually liked this. I added 2
hard boiled eggs, celery, cilantro instead of parsley, and
curry powder instead of plain turmeric. I ate mine with
greens and spinach, he ate his as a sandwich. Thanks so much
for posting a keeper!!

Row 89075Tofu Egg Salad Recipes★★★★★
This is pretty good. I'm personally not a fan of using
uncooked tofu so I sauteed the tofu in butter, garlic, salt
and pepper. Browned it a little then mashed it up and added
the other ingredients. I think you should add as much mayo
as you like, more or less. Granted this doesn't taste
exactly like...

Row 89076Tofu Egg Salad Recipes★★★☆☆
This was just ok for us. Flavor was just a little off. I'm
determined to find a great tasting tofu "salad" recipe for
sandwiches. Glad I tried this but it wasn't "the one."

Row 89082Tofu Egg Salad Recipes★★★★★
Delicious! Had tofu salad from Costco once and loved it,
but never tried to make at home. I cut everything in half
for one brick of extra firm tofu, but left the mayo about
the same as my tofu was really pressed and dry after
draining. Used a homemade mayo recipe so not vegan, but
still healthier...

Row 662Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★
Yum! something this quick should not taste so good and be so
healthy. Even people who don't like tofu should like this
one and it is a great way of using nutritional yeast. I
made a few minor changes using grapeseed oil, ketjap manis,
lime juice and wholegrain mustard because that's what I had
in t...

Row 667Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★
This is so good and it's good on so many things, as others
have mentioned. I heated it and served it over angel hair

stop eating. My one year old grandson loved it. Doesn't
matter if you don't like tofu; it doesn't taste like tofu.

Row 668Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★
This was different from other pasta sauces I've had or made,
but it was tasty. No one will know there's tofu in it unless
you tell them, and it's got a whole lot more protein than
your average pasta sauce. We enjoyed it over Barilla Plus
penne and steamed broccoli.

Row 1761Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★☆☆☆☆
Oh my goodness this was just plain awful. Even after 3 hours
cooking, the rice is still hard and the tofu is chunky.
<br/>Trying to save it by letting it cook longer.
There HAS to be a step or three missing.

Row 2184Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★
Wow, this is Fantastic!! I served it over a salad of mixed
greens,carrots, green onions and lightly salted peanuts and
Chow Mein Noodles on the side.15 Ladies devoured almost the
entire pint it made! :-)I would love to know what "Wafu"
means/stands for? Regardless this is a KEEPER.

Row 2232Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★
This is our new favorite stir-fry recipe! The sauce is

marinate and fry the tofu first, as I do with all stir-
fries, it gives the tofu a much better flavor and texture in
the dish. Thank you so much for posting this great recipe!
We will defi...

Row 2234Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★
Just the right sweetness. I halved the tofu though, using

I made the full recipe other than that. I used enoki
mushrooms, red instead of green bell pepper, and I added
diagonally cut bok choy when I added the tofu cubes. It was
delicious. M...

Row 2432Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★

this to my husband and he had no idea he was eating tofu,
both of us are looking forward to seeing if the leftovers
are...

Row 2433Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★
I was totally amazed by this dish! I've never had tofu
before (not knowingly anyway!) but I'm always looking for
ways to make my favorite dishes lighter and healthier so I
decided to give this a try. I don't care for onions so left
them out, and I used turkey sausage instead of ground beef,

Row 2436Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★

Row 3419Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★☆☆

Row 7228Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★
Thanks for posting this. I bought saving dinner cookbook
and this is without a doubt the best recipe in it. I omit
the butter. I also make this with tofu (I drain and
marinate the tofu in chicken broth, lime juice and garlic
powder overnight to give it some flavor to start with) and
it is aweso...

Row 13947Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★

Row 17661Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★
This was really good and froze well. I followed the recipe

Making another batch tomorrow. Thanks for the recipe. Follow
up: This has become a staple for me. To make this more
nutritious, I use half white and half brown rice and add one

Row 18996Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★

Row 20129Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★☆

Row 24056Tofu Recipes and Cooking Experiences★★★★★

oni...
